title: miliusa arborea
intro: Miliusa arborea, also known as the Borneo box tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Borneo and Malaysia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Miliusa arborea include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism. Miliusa arborea is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and its bark and leaves are traditionally used to make medicine.
